mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cdc_article_request (mode, entity_type, entity_id, population_id, scene_id, template_id, word_count, user_text, entity_name, population_name, scene_name, create_time) VALUES (#{mode}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{populationId}, #{sceneId}, #{templateId}, #{wordCount}, #{userText}, #{entityName}, #{populationName}, #{sceneName}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cdc_article_request ORDER BY create_time DESC
